Scanty, clear, scalding urine. Intense dyspn�a ; must sit up. Respiration rapid, short; burning in chest. Hydrothorax ( Ars ). Card...

remedies.name: Mercurialis Perennis
remedies.description: MERCURIALIS PERENNIS Dog's Mercury Great exhaustion and drowsiness. Tumor at ensiform appendix, very sensitive. Affections of the muscular fibers of stomach, intestines, bladder.

remedies.name: Methylenum Coeruleum
remedies.description: METHYLENUM COERULEUM One of the Aniline Dyes (METHYLENE BLUE) A remedy for neuralgia, neurasthenia, malaria; typhoid , here it diminishes the tympanites, delirium, and fever; pus infection. Tendency to tremor, chorea and epilepsy. Nephritis (acute parenchymatous), scarlatinal nephritis. Urine acquires a green color. Bladder irritation from its use antidoted by a little nutmeg. Surgical kidney with large amount of pus in urine. Gonorrh�al rheumatism and cystitis. Backache, sciatica. Later stat...

remedies.name: Micromeria Douglasii
remedies.description: MICROMERIA DOUGLASII Yerba Buena (MICROMERIA) A California mint-like plant acting on stomach and bowels. Used as a tea to cure colic and relieve flatulence. Is a pleasant beverage and febrifuge, blood purifyer and tonic.

remedies.name: Mitchella Repens
remedies.description: MITCHELLA REPENS Partridge-berry (MITCHELLA) Bladder symptoms accompany complaints, especially uterine congestion.

remedies.name: Momordica Balsamica
remedies.description: MOMORDICA BALSAMICA Balsam Apple Griping, colic, pain in back and hypogastrium with painful and excessive menses. Accumulation of flatus in splenic flexure of colon. Dropsy.

remedies.name: Morphinum
remedies.description: MORPHINUM An Alkaloid of Opium Morphine bears the same relation to Opium as Atropine to Belladonna-i.e, represents its nervous side. It is less stimulating, less convulsant, and more decidedly hypnotic. Constipates less and affects contractility of the bladder more. It is less diaphoretic and more pruritic.

remedies.name: Moschus
remedies.description: MOSCHUS Musk A remedy for hysteria and nervous paroxysms, fainting fits and convulsions, catalepsy, etc. The characteristic condition being aggravation by cold; there is great sensitiveness to air. Much nervous trembling and frequent fainting. Great flatulence. Diseases do not follow a normal course. Coldness . Tension in muscles, skin and mind.

remedies.name: Murex Purpurea
remedies.description: MUREX PURPUREA Purple Fish (MUREX) The symptoms of the female sexual organs are most-prominent, and have been clinically verified. Especially adapted to nervous, lively, affectionate women. Patient weak and run down.

remedies.name: Mygale Lasiodora
remedies.description: MYGALE LASIODORA Black Cuban Spider Weakness, palpitation, nervousness, fear, like other spider preparations. Chorea is the principal therapeutic field of this. Sexual symptoms are important.

remedies.name: Myosotis Symphytifolia
remedies.description: MYOSOTIS SYMPHYTIFOLIA Forget-me-not (MYOSOTIS) Chronic bronchitis and phthisis. Night-sweats.

remedies.name: Myrica Cerifera
remedies.description: MYRICA CERIFERA Bayberry (MYRICA) Marked action on the liver, with jaundice and mucous membranes. Persistent sleeplessness. Jaundice.

remedies.name:
Myrtus Communis

n
remedies.description: MYRTUS COMMUNIS Myrtle The leaves contain Myrtol, an active antiseptic. Chest pains, as found often in consumptives, call for this remedy. Incipient phthisis. Nerve sedative and stimulant to mucous membranes, bronchitis, cystitis and pyelitis.

remedies.name: Naphthalinum
remedies.description: NAPHTHALINUM A chemical compound from Coal-tar; Tar Camphor (NAPHTHALINE) Coryza, hay-fever, phthisis pulmonalis, also gonorrh�a have been influenced favorably by this drug. Pyelonephritis. Irritation of the periphery of the urinary apparatus. Whooping-cough.
remedies.dosage: Externally in skin diseases, five per cent ointment.

remedies.name: Narcissus Pseudonarcissus
remedies.description: NARCISSUS PSEUDONARCISSUS Daffodil (NARCISSUS) Symptoms of nausea followed by violent vomiting and diarrh�a. Daffodil bulbs contain an alkaloid the action of which, according to authorities, varies as to whether the alkaloid is extracted from the flowering bulb or from the bulb after flowering. Thus in the former case the alkaloid produces dryness of the mouth, checks cutaneous secretions, dilates the pupil of the eye, quickens the pulse, and slows and weakens the heart contractions . On the ...

remedies.name: Natrium Arsenicosum
remedies.description: NATRIUM ARSENICOSUM Arseniate of Sodium (NATRUM ARSENICUM) A remedy for nasal catarrh, with headache, pain at root of nose, dry and painful eyes. Psoriasis ( Ars; Chrysoph ac; Thyroid ). Bronchitis of children over seven years. Facilitates the termination of the cold and conserves strength and appetite (Cartier).

remedies.name: Natrium Hypochlorosum
remedies.description: NATRIUM HYPOCHLOROSUM Labarraque's Solution (NATRUM CHLORATUM) In congested and atonic states of the uterus and its ligaments, with hepatic disorders. Chronic catarrhal diseases of the middle ear. Flabby, debilitated constitution . Both hands swollen in morning. Phlegmatic. Depressed, faint.
remedies.dosage: Fifteen to twenty drops of Labarraque's solution in water.

remedies.name: Natrium Nitricum
remedies.description: NATRIUM NITRICUM Nitrate of Sodium (NATRUM NITRICUM) A Rademacherian remedy for inflammations . H�moptysis. H�maturia. Purpura h�morrhagica. H�morrhagic Variola. Drowsiness. Pains of tabes. Influenza . Hemoglobinuria. Uric acid diathesis. Asthma with urine supersaturated with solids. An�mia and hydr�mia. Exhaustion, must rest frequently when walking.
remedies.dosage: Second trituration, also watery solution; 1 dram of salt to 8 oz water.

remedies.name: Natrium Salicylicum
remedies.description: NATRIUM SALICYLICUM Salicylate of Sodium (NATRUM SALICYLICUM) Has an extensive range of action affecting the head, ear, throat, kidneys and liver and on metabolism. H�morrhages, especially epistaxis. Produces marked effects upon the internal ear, with vertigo, deafness, noises in ears and loss of bone conduction, hence, its use in Meniere's disease. One of the best remedies for the prostrating after-effects of influenza . Lassitude, drowsiness, listlessness, tremor. Incipient dementia. Increa...

remedies.name: Niccolum Metallicum
remedies.description: NICCOLUM METALLICUM Metallic Nickel (NICCOLUM) Periodical nervous sick headaches, with asthenopia, weak digestion, constipation. Catarrh. Suits debilitated, nervous, literary patients, with frequent headaches, dyspepsia and constipation.

remedies.name: Niccolum Sulphuricum
remedies.description: NICCOLUM SULPHURICUM Sulphate of Nickel Useful in climacteric disturbances. Periodic neuralgias of malarial origin. Urine and saliva increased. Coppery taste. Weak, asthenopic literally persons with weak digestion and constipation, are worse in morning and suffer from periodic headaches and hoarseness.

remedies.name: Nitromuriaticum Acidum
remedies.description: NITROMURIATICUM ACIDUM Aqua Regia (NITRO-MURIATIC ACID) Almost a specific in Oxaluria. Removes the distressing skin symptoms resembling psoriasis. Three to five drops three times a day. So-called bilious conditions; torpid liver, hepatitis and early cirrhosis of liver. More adapted to hepatic torpor and gastric catarrh common in hot and damp climates and aggravated by meat eating and alcohol (Hale). Constricted anus. Gravel.
remedies.dosage: Five to ten drops, well diluted.

remedies.name: Nitri Spiritus Dulcis
remedies.description: NITRI SPIRITUS DULCIS Sweet Spirits of Nitre Sensorial apathy in low fevers when there is stupor, difficulty of arousing patient, is met by this remedy. Dry skin, nausea, flatulence. Salty taste. Ill-effects of salt (halophagia) ( Ars; Phos ). Catching cold in stormy weather. Acute nephritis following Scarlet fever. Dropsy. Is an excellent diuretic.
remedies.dosage: A few drops of the pure spirits in water every two or three hours.

remedies.name: Nuphar Luteum
remedies.description: NUPHAR LUTEUM Yellow Pond-lily Produces nervous weakness, with marked symptoms in the sexual sphere.

remedies.name:
Nyctanthes Arbor Tristis

o
remedies.description: NYCTANTHES ARBOR TRISTIS Paghala-malli-Sad Tree Bilious and obstinate remittent fever; sciatica; rheumatism. Constipation of children.

remedies.name: Ocimum Canum
remedies.description: OCIMUM CANUM Brazilian Alfavaca Is to be remembered in diseases of the kidneys, bladder and urethra. Uric acid diathesis. Red sand in the urine is its chief characteristic, and frequently verified. Swelling of glands, inguinal and mammary. Renal colic, especially right side. Symptoms of renal calculus are pronounced.

remedies.name: Oenanthe Crocata
remedies.description: OENANTHE CROCATA Water Dropwart Epileptiform convulsions; worse, during menstruation and pregnancy. Puerperal eclampsia; ur�mic convulsions. Burning in throat and stomach, nausea and vomiting. Red spots in face. Convulsive facial twitching. Skin affections, especially lepra and ichthyosis.

remedies.name: Oleum Animale Aethereum
remedies.description: OLEUM ANIMALE AETHEREUM Dippel's Animal Oil (OLEUM ANIMALE) Acts on the nervous system, especially on pneumo-gastric region. Useful in migraine and neuralgia of spermatic cord. Burning pains and stitches. " Pulled upward " and " from behind forward " pains.
remedies.dosage: Third to thirtieth potency and higher.

remedies.name: Oleum Jecoris Aselli
remedies.description: OLEUM JECORIS ASELLI Cod-liver Oil Internally, a nutrient and a hepatic and pancreatic remedy (Burnett). Emaciation, lassitude, scrofulous diseases, rheumatic affections. Atrophy of infants ; emaciation with hot hands and head; restless and feverish at night. Pains in liver region . Tuberculosis in the beginning.

remedies.name: Oleum Santali
remedies.description: OLEUM SANTALI Oil of Sandalwood The action in the urinary and sexual spheres is most utilizable, especially in gonorrh�a. It is also a stimulating, disinfectant expectorant. Two or three drops on sugar will frequently relieve the hacking cough, when but little sputum is expectorated.
remedies.dosage: Two to ten m in capsules.

remedies.name: Gymnema Sylvestre
remedies.description: Gurmar - destroys sugar taste. Very important in Indian practice for diabetes. Used extensively for glycosuria and sugar regulation in homeopathy.

remedies.name: Terminalia Arjuna
remedies.description: Arjuna - the primary Indian cardiac tonic in homeopathy. Strengthens heart muscle, reduces angina, and helps cardiac debility. Extremely popular in Indian practice.

remedies.name: Terminalia Chebula
remedies.description: Haritaki - one of Triphala herbs. Very popular in Indian homeopathy for constipation, eye problems, and chronic digestive disorders. A great rejuvenating remedy.

remedies.name: Withania Somnifera
remedies.description: Ashwagandha - the great Indian adaptogen in homeopathy. Used for debility, stress, nervous exhaustion, and low vitality. Widely prescribed in India for general weakness.

remedies.name: Syzygium Cumini
remedies.description: Jamun - the Indian blackberry. One of the most important Indian homeopathic remedies for diabetes. Reduces sugar in urine and controls blood sugar levels.

remedies.name: Tinospora Cordifolia
remedies.description: Giloy/Guduchi - extremely important in Indian traditional and homeopathic medicine for fever, immunity boosting, liver protection, and chronic debility.

remedies.name: Curcuma Longa
remedies.description: Turmeric - used in Indian homeopathy for liver complaints, skin disorders, and inflammatory conditions. Anti-inflammatory and hepatoprotective properties.

remedies.name: Adhatoda Vasica
remedies.description: Vasaka/Adulsa - one of the most important Indian cough remedies. Highly effective for bronchitis, asthma, and all respiratory conditions with cough. Widely used across India.

remedies.name: Aegle Marmelos
remedies.description: Bael fruit - very popular in Indian homeopathy for chronic diarrhea, dysentery, and digestive disorders. Also useful for mucous colitis and intestinal complaints.
